name: A Glimpse of Southern Vietnam 4 days
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Cu Chi Tunnels - Mekong Delta - Ben Tre
highlights: Explore the historical heart of Ho Chi Minh City, including colonial landmarks and colorful markets.
Venture deep into the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels and relive the resilience of wartime Vietnam.
Glide through lush canals on a sampan boat in the Mekong Delta and sample tropical fruits and coconut candy.
Experience local village life by tuk tuk, with stops for honey tea, orchard strolls, and riverside dining.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Arrival - Half Day City Tour with Halal Dinner
itinerary.description: Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City, the dynamic heart of Southern Vietnam where centuries-old traditions meet modern urban energy. Upon arrival, you will be warmly greeted and transferred to your hotel to settle in before beginning your cultural journey. Your tour begins at Masjid Musulman, one of the most prominent mosques in the city and a spiritual center for the Muslim community. This peaceful oasis in the heart of the city invites quiet reflection, offering an early glimpse into the religious diversity of Vietnam. You will also pass by Lamson Mosque, another beautifully maintained mosque that re...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Cu Chi Tunnels Half Day
itinerary.description: Around 08:00, embark on a scenic 2-hour drive from Ho Chi Minh City to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels. As the cityscape fades into tranquil countryside, enjoy the passing views of rice paddies, rubber plantations, and small villages - offering a peaceful window into southern Vietnam’s rural life. Upon arrival at the Cu Chi Tunnels, you’ll step back in time into one of the most iconic remnants of the Vietnam War. This vast network of underground tunnels once served as hidden living quarters, supply routes, and guerrilla strongholds for Vietnamese soldiers. The visit begins with a short documentar...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Insight Mekong Delta Full Day
itinerary.description: Your immersive journey into the heart of southern Vietnam begins with a morning pick-up from your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City between 08:00 to 08:30. As you leave the urban skyline behind, the road leads you through a peaceful stretch of emerald rice paddies and rustic villages, offering a glimpse into the rhythms of rural life. Arriving in the charming riverside town of My Tho, you’ll embark on an unforgettable three-hour boating and walking excursion through the legendary Mekong Delta. This lush, water-laced region - often called the “rice bowl” of Vietnam - is a vibrant tapestry of winding ri...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Departure
itinerary.description: As your journey in southern Vietnam comes to an end, take time to absorb the final impressions of Ho Chi Minh City, a vibrant metropolis that pulses with energy, history, and modern charm. From its bustling boulevards to quiet alleyway cafes, this city leaves a lasting mark on every traveler. Depending on your flight schedule, enjoy some free time for a last stroll around your hotel or a quick stop at a local café for one final cup of strong Vietnamese coffee. When the time comes, you will be transferred to Tan Son Nhat International Airport, where your departure marks the close of an unforget...

included: Accommodation in DBL/ TWN sharing room
All transport during tour (including airport pick up and see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
